allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $dir = 'crates\\frontend\\assets\\fonts'; $cm = @{ 'CommitMono-Regular.otf' = 'https://github.com/eigilnikolajsen/commit-mono/raw/main/dist/4 OTF \(recommended\)/CommitMono-400-Regular.otf'; 'CommitMono-Bold.otf' = 'https://github.com/eigilnikolajsen/commit-mono/raw/main/dist/4 OTF \(recommended\)/CommitMono-700-Regular.otf' }; foreach \($name in $cm.Keys\) { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $cm[$name] -OutFile \(Join-Path $dir $name\) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $size = \(Get-Item \(Join-Path $dir $name\)\).Length; "$name $size bytes" } catch { "FAIL $name $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
